author: charlesfreeborn
content:
Today, I published my first distributed system research article to explore how a 1978 distributed systems theory became the backbone of the Bitcoin Whitepaper.

What Lamport's 1978 paper tells us about why Nakamoto chose the longest chain rule.

1. https://x.com/charliecodes/status/2033893866152079682?s=20

2. Link to the article https://freeborncharles.com/posts/lamport-nakamoto/

Thanks
